title: Hugging Face Transformers
description: State-of-the-art Machine Learning for Pytorch, TensorFlow, and JAX. Essential repo for LLM and deep learning implementations.

title: Attention Is All You Need
description: The seminal paper establishing the Transformer architecture. Required reading for AI engineers.

title: Pandas Official Documentation
description: The official handbook for Pandas data manipulation. Vital for feature engineering and basic analysis.

title: Scikit-Learn Official User Guide
description: Comprehensive guide to classic machine learning models: SVMs, Random Forests, Regression, and Clustering.

title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow et al.)
description: The authoritative textbook on Deep Learning mathematics and architectures by Ian Goodfellow.

title: PyTorch Tutorials
description: Hands-on tutorials for implementing neural networks in PyTorch.

title: FastAPI Framework
description: High performance web framework for building APIs with Python 3.8+.

title: React.js Documentation
description: The cornerstone documentation for the world's most popular frontend framework.

title: Eloquent JavaScript
description: A modern introduction to programming and JavaScript. Best for beginners.

title: System Design Primer
description: The definitive open-source guide to learning how to design large-scale systems.

title: The Hundred-Page Machine Learning Book
description: A compact, highly practical introduction to ML concepts.

title: Linux Kernel Documentation
description: Deep dive into OS level constraints, scheduling, memory management, and file systems.

title: LangChain Framework
description: Building applications with LLMs through composability.

title: SQL Tutorial (W3Schools)
description: Quick, highly accessible reference for relational database queries.

title: Docker Official Docs
description: The industry standard for containerization and micro-service deployments.
